question: Will Bitcoin hit $1M before GTA VI?
narrative_context: Bitcoin price April 2026: $71,500–$78,772 range; expert consensus is $75K–$150K maximum for 2026 (Binance, Kraken, BeInCrypto surveys, April 2026)
$1M price target is for 2030+, not 2026 (Jurrien Timmer/Fidelity, Cathie Wood/Ark Invest, multiple sources, April 2026)
Would require 1,328% price increase in ~4 months (from ~$75K to $1M by Aug 22, 2026)—no precedent in Bitcoin's history
GTA VI launch confirmed for Sept 2026; Bitcoin would need to 10x from current levels in 4-5 months with no analyst consensus supporting it
thesis: This is a >40pp mispricing. Bitcoin reaching $1M before GTA VI (Aug 22) requires a 10x rally in 4 months with zero expert support. The consensus forecast is $75K–$150K by end-2026. Experts who cite $1M targets point to 2030. This is fundamentally driven by a meme/casino bet, not market fundamentals.

Current Bitcoin: $75K. Target: $1M. Timeline: 4 months. Required gain: 1,328%. Expert consensus: $75K–$150K by end-2026.

This isn't a thesis—it's a casino bet dressed up as a market. Skip the hype. Check the fundamentals: https://dub.sh/pb-x
